case_title: GARFIELD, ALLEN M. VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARFIELD, ALLEN M.
